events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: a **pass** at low risk for this rough-complete structural weld — the unit is correctly located and identified (legible nameplates/orientation marks), undamaged, and matches the referenced detail with no observed discontinuities. Since rough-complete precedes final closeout, I flagged remaining workable steps (formal VT per AWS D1.1 Clause 6, any specified NDT, and weld-map traceability sign-off) before the item can move to tested/inspected or accepted status.
